case_title: BLANCHARD, FRED HAROLD vs. SJOUWKE, WANDA FRIEDA et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLANCHARD, FRED HAROLD AS TO DEFENDANT SJOUWKE, WANDA FRIEDA SJOUWKE, JOHN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-03-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-02-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-13-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-01-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON SEP-01-1995, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND WHY COURT SHOULD NOT DISMISS CASE OR TAKE OTHER ACTION. HEARING SET FOR OCT-03-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-03-1995, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-03-1995, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), (2ND OSC FOR PLAINTIFF), PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-27-1995 CONTINUED FROM OCT-03-1995 TO NOV-02-1995 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-03-1995, CONTINUED TO SEP-01-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY 8/25/95. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
